name: Egg Bhurji with 2 Wheat Toast
description: Scrambled eggs cooked with onions, tomatoes, and Indian green chilies, served with toast.

name: Malabar Egg Roast with Appam
description: Boiled eggs cooked in a spicy, caramelized onion-tomato coconut gravy with fermented rice crepes.

name: Chicken Keema Paratha
description: Whole wheat bread stuffed with lean spiced minced chicken, roasted on a griddle.

name: Boiled Egg White Salad
description: Chipped egg whites tossed with cucumbers, onions, and ground black pepper.

name: Chicken Tikka Skewers (6 pcs)
description: Skinless chicken breasts marinated in yogurt and red spices, grilled in a clay oven.

name: Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani (Lean)
description: Aromatic basmati rice cooked with layered marinated chicken and fresh mint in sealed pot.

name: Chettinad Chicken Curry with Rice
description: Fiery southern chicken curry made with roasted spices, poppy seeds, and coconut, served with rice.

name: Kerala Fish Curry with Brown Rice
description: Traditional red fish curry made with kokum (tamarind) and medium spiced coconut milk gravy.

name: Amritsari Fish Tikka with Mint Dip
description: Spiced gram-flour battered fish cubes baked until golden and crispy.

name: Butter Chicken (High Protein / Low Fat) with 2 Rotis
description: Tandoori chicken pieces cooked in a cashew-tomato gravy sweetened with honey.

name: Kolhapuri Mutton Sukka with Bhakri
description: Spicy, dry lamb preparation from Kolhapur, roasted with fresh spices and served with sorghum bread.

name: Goan Prawn Balchao with Rice
description: Prawns cooked in a fiery, tangy tomato-vinegar pickle sauce, served with basmati rice.

name: Bengali Macher Jhol with Rice
description: Light and comforting mustard-based fish stew cooked with potatoes and cauliflowers.

name: Assamese Duck Curry with Steamed Rice
description: Rich traditional duck curry cooked with ash gourd (white pumpkin) and spices, served with rice.

name: Chicken Momo with Sesame Chutney (8 pcs)
description: Steamed dumplings stuffed with juicy minced chicken and served with spicy tomato chutney.

name: Shami Kabab (Chicken, 2 pcs)
description: Silky lentil and chicken patties flavored with mint and cardamom.

name: Doi Maach (Bengali Yogurt Fish) with Rice
description: Fish steaks simmered in a mildly spiced, sweet and sour yogurt sauce, served with rice.

name: Kashmiri Rogan Josh (Lean Cut) with 2 Naan
description: Slow-cooked lean lamb stew spiced with Kashmiri chilies and fennel.
